data.content: Shipment review approved. Commit 7b17b3e038c0 (feat(lease-diagnostics): exclude weak-signal entries from leaderboards) is live on origin/main. Implementation: meetsLeaderboardThresholds (lease-audit-helpers.ts:213-221) correctly enforces total>=10 AND rate>25% (strictly greater, so exactly 25% is excluded). buildLeaderboard (lines 223+) filters to qualifiedStats before all ranking/aggregation, and steps with zero qualified agents are fully omitted. Verification: 33 tests pass (all threshold edge cases covered), tsc --noEmit clean, no regressions.
